name: Fried Cinnamon Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large resealable plastic bag, combine the sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg; set aside.
2. Cut the tortillas into 3-inch x 2-inch strips.
3. Heat 1 inch of oil in a skillet or electric fry pan to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Fry 4-5 strips at a time for 30 seconds on each side, or until golden brown.
5. Drain the strips on paper towels.
6. While still warm, place the strips in the bag with the sugar mixture; shake gently to coat.
7. Serve immediately or store in an airtight container. Yield: 5 dozen.
